calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-24-2025 Continued To Jun-01-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice O Fmotion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Demand For Production Of Documents, Set One
Off Calendar Oct-31-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

2 - DEFENDANT LARA KAMAL's Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Demand For Production Of Documents, Set One.

Defendant Lara Redha Kamal's unopposed motion to compel Plaintiff Peter P. Verzola-Alcantara's responses to her Special Interrogatories is granted.

The discovery requests at issue appear reasonably calculated to lead to the discovery of admissible evidence. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 2017.010.) Plaintiff has not established that he has provided any responses to the Special Interrogatories. No meet and confer requirement exists for motions to compel responses for Special Interrogatories when no responses have been provided. (Code of Civil Procedure section 2030.290.)

Plaintiff shall serve verified, objection-free, substantive responses to Defendant's Special Interrogatories, Set One by November 21, 2025.

Plaintiff Peter P. Verzola-Alcantara has not demonstrated he acted with substantial justification in connection with this discovery. Plaintiff Peter P. Verzola-Alcantara shall pay $560 to Defendant Lara Redha Kamal as sanctions, payment no later than November 21, 2025. (See Code of Civil Procedure sections 2023.030, 2030.290(c).)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One;
Off Calendar Oct-31-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

1 - DEFENDANT LARA KAMAL's Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One.

Defendant Lara Redha Kamal's unopposed motion to compel Plaintiff Peter P. Verzola-Alcantara's responses to her Form Interrogatories is granted.

The discovery requests at issue appear reasonably calculated to lead to the discovery of admissible evidence. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 2017.010.) Plaintiff has not established that he has provided any responses to the Form Interrogatories. No meet and confer requirement exists for motions to compel responses for Form Interrogatories when no responses have been provided. (Code of Civil Procedure section 2030.290.)

Plaintiff shall serve verified, objection-free, substantive responses to Defendant's Form Interrogatories, Set One by November 21, 2025.

Plaintiff Peter P. Verzola-Alcantara has not demonstrated he acted with substantial justification in connection with this discovery. Plaintiff Peter P. Verzola-Alcantara shall pay $560 to Defendant Lara Redha Kamal as sanctions, payment no later than November 21, 2025. (See Code of Civil Procedure sections 2023.030, 2030.290(c).)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Moton To Compel Plaintiff'S Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One;
Off Calendar Oct-31-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

3 - DEFENDANT LARA KAMAL's Moton To Compel Plaintiff'S Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One.

Defendant Lara Redha Kamal's unopposed motion to compel Plaintiff Peter P. Verzola-Alcantara's responses to her Request For Production Of Documents ("RFPs") is granted.

The discovery requests at issue appear reasonably calculated to lead to the discovery of admissible evidence. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 2017.010.) The record demonstrates Plaintiff did not provide any responses to the RFPs. No meet and confer requirement exists for motions to compel responses for requests for production of documents when no responses have been provided. (Code of Civil Procedure section 2031.300.)

Plaintiff shall serve verified, objection-free, substantive responses to Defendant's RFPs, Set One by November 13, 2025.

Plaintiff Peter P. Verzola-Alcantara has not demonstrated he acted with substantial justification in connection with this discovery. Plaintiff Peter P. Verzola-Alcantara shall pay $560 to Defendant Lara Redha Kamal as sanctions, payment no later than November 13, 2025. (See Code of Civil Procedure sections 2023.030, 2031.300(c).)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
